en.hello__l2__zh: 拥有丰富经验的软件工程师与产品经理
en.hero__tagline: Bridging deep technical engineering with strategic product thinking.
en.about__data-driven__content: Turning complex data into revenue and cost savings.
en.about__ai-business__content: Shipping AI products from 0 to 1 with measurable impact.
en.about__cross-func__content: Unblocking teams across Engineering, Finance, and Design.
en.about__global__content: Building products across cultures and time zones.
en.case-studies__intro: Selected examples of how I identify business problems, drive cross-functional execution, and deliver measurable outcomes.
en.case-study-1__problem: AWS had a systemic billing discrepancy pattern across large-scale usage datasets with no systematic monitoring, leading to significant revenue leakage.
en.case-study-1__role: Led data analysis and remediation. Owned quantitative validation and cross-functional coordination with Finance and Engineering teams.
en.case-study-1__process-1: Analyzed telemetry with SQL/Python, quantified financial impact, and coordinated remediation across Engineering and Finance.
en.case-study-1__process-2: Quantified financial impact to secure leadership buy-in from Finance stakeholders.
en.case-study-1__process-3: Coordinated remediation across Engineering (root cause fix) and Finance (account reconciliation).
en.case-study-1__outcome: Recovered ~$500K in billing discrepancies and established ongoing monitoring practices to prevent future leakage.
en.case-study-2__problem: Cloud capacity was either over-provisioned (wasting CapEx) or under-provisioned (risking outages). Annual waste was estimated in the millions with no data-driven planning.
en.case-study-2__role: Built and validated forecasting models. Owned the feature engineering pipeline and back-testing methodology before production deployment.
en.case-study-2__process-1: Engineered features on telemetry data and built/back-tested time-series forecasting models in Python.
en.case-study-2__process-2: Built and back-tested time-series forecasting models in Python against historical data.
en.case-study-2__process-3: Validated model accuracy and business impact before recommending production deployment.
en.case-study-2__outcome: Reduced annual CapEx by ~$1.5M through optimized capacity planning, with models maintaining high accuracy in production.
en.case-study-3__title: Core Infrastructure Ownership in Cross-Functional Launch
en.case-study-3__context: AWS Lambda Managed Instances was a major product launch requiring coordination across multiple service teams with complex infrastructure dependencies.
en.case-study-3__role: Owned a critical piece of the core infrastructure. Served as the subject matter expert (SME) for my domain across collaborating teams.
en.case-study-3__process-1: Resolved blocking dependencies across teams, authored org-wide best practices, and served as cross-team SME.
en.case-study-3__process-2: Authored internal best practices that were adopted organization-wide beyond my immediate team.
en.case-study-3__process-3: Served as the go-to expert for cross-team integration questions and technical alignment.
en.case-study-3__outcome: Successful launch of a major AWS feature. My best practices became organizational standards, reducing onboarding time for future cross-team projects.
en.experience__intro_l1: Former AWS Software Engineer. Currently at BNU studying World Economics. Seeking Product Management roles in Tech & Finance.
en.professional__1__bp1: Recovered $500K in billing discrepancies using Python/SQL. Led cross-functional remediation with Finance and Engineering.
en.professional__1__bp2: Reduced annual CapEx by ~$1.5M through time-series forecasting and feature engineering on telemetry data.
en.professional__1__bp3: Led cross-team execution for AWS Lambda Managed Instances. Resolved blocking dependencies and established org-wide best practices.
en.professional__2__bp1: Engineered and open-sourced a vision-language dataset with 10M+ text-image pairs.
en.professional__2__bp2: Cut dataset size by 50%, training time by 60%, and GPU usage by 90% with <10% performance loss.
en.professional__2__bp3: Built an automated DeFi asset management strategy using Deep Learning and Reinforcement Learning.
en.professional__2__bp4: Achieved 5% ROI through backtesting across historical market data.
en.professional__3__bp1: Identified barriers to social program enrollment for Hispanic immigrants through survey design and analysis.
en.professional__3__bp2: Created data visualizations and presented findings at a community-focused conference.
en.publication__1__title: A Data Science Pipeline for Algorithmic Trading: A Comparative Study of Applications for Finance and Cryptoeconomics
en.publication__1__author: L. Zhang, T. Wu, S. Lahrichi, C.G. Salas-Flores, J. Li
en.publication__2__title: Making Text-Image Connection Formal and Practical
en.publication__2__author: L. Zhang, C.G. Salas-Flores, D. Zou
en.award__1__desc: Prestigious scholarship awarded for academic excellence and high-potential research in global economics.
en.award__2__desc: Developed 'Blinder Resume,' an AI-driven tool leveraging GPT-3 to mitigate unconscious bias in the recruitment process.
en.award__3__title: National Finalist: Alibaba GET Global Challenge
en.award__3__desc: Architected a mental health platform, advancing to the China National Finals among 250+ competing teams.
en.award__4__desc: Academic distinction awarded for maintaining a GPA within the top 10% of the cohort.
en.award__5__desc: Four-year competitive scholarship covering 100% of undergraduate tuition based on academic merit.
en.beyond__intro: The person behind the product — how diverse experiences shape my approach to building and leading.
en.facts__street-dance__content: Competitive breakdancer. Discipline, creativity, high-stakes performance.
en.facts__traveling__content: Lived in 3 countries. Cross-cultural collaboration is second nature.
en.facts__mandarin__content: HSK 4 Mandarin. Deep cultural immersion, not just language.
en.contact__message: Open to Product Management opportunities in Tech & Finance.

zh.hello__l1: 北京师范大学经管学院硕士研究生
zh.hello__l2: 拥有丰富经验的软件工程师与产品经理
zh.hello__l2__zh: 拥有丰富经验的软件工程师与产品经理
zh.hero__tagline: 以深厚技术工程能力为基石，驱动战略性产品思维落地。
zh.about__data-driven__content: 将复杂数据转化为营收与成本节约。
zh.about__ai-business__content: 从 0 到 1 推动 AI 产品落地，实现可衡量的业务影响。
zh.about__cross-func__content: 打通工程、财务与设计团队，高效推进项目。
zh.about__global__content: 跨越文化与时区构建产品。
zh.case-studies__intro: 以下精选案例展示了我如何识别业务问题、推动跨职能执行并实现可衡量的成果。
zh.case-study-1__title: 计费异常检测与收入追回
zh.case-study-1__problem: AWS 在大规模使用数据集中存在系统性的计费差异模式，缺乏系统性监控，导致大量收入流失。
zh.case-study-1__role: 主导数据分析与修复工作。负责量化验证，并与财务和工程团队进行跨部门协调。
zh.case-study-1__process-1: 使用 SQL/Python 分析遥测数据，量化财务影响，并协调工程与财务团队进行修复。
zh.case-study-1__process-2: 量化财务影响，以获得财务部门领导层的支持。
zh.case-study-1__process-3: 协调工程团队（修复根本原因）和财务团队（账户对账）进行修复。
zh.case-study-1__outcome: 追回约 50 万美元的计费差异，并建立了持续监控机制以防止未来的收入流失。
zh.case-study-2__title: 机器学习驱动的云容量优化
zh.case-study-2__problem: 云容量要么过度配置（浪费资本支出），要么配置不足（导致服务中断风险）。年度浪费估计达数百万美元，且缺乏数据驱动的规划。
zh.case-study-2__role: 构建并验证预测模型。负责特征工程流水线和回测方法，确保生产部署前的可靠性。
zh.case-study-2__process-1: 对遥测数据进行特征工程，构建并回测 Python 时间序列预测模型。
zh.case-study-2__process-2: 使用 Python 基于历史数据构建并回测时间序列预测模型。
zh.case-study-2__process-3: 在推荐生产部署之前，验证模型的准确性和业务影响。
zh.case-study-2__outcome: 通过优化容量规划，每年节省约 150 万美元资本支出，模型在生产环境中保持高准确性。
zh.case-study-3__title: 跨职能发布中的核心基础设施 ownership
zh.case-study-3__context: AWS Lambda Managed Instances 是一项重大产品发布，需要跨多个服务团队协调，涉及复杂的基础设施依赖关系。
zh.case-study-3__role: 拥有核心基础设施的关键部分。作为我所在领域的主题专家（SME），为协作团队提供支持。
zh.case-study-3__process-1: 解决跨团队阻塞依赖，撰写组织级最佳实践，并担任跨团队主题专家。
zh.case-study-3__process-2: 撰写内部最佳实践，并被整个组织采纳，超越了我所在团队的范畴。
zh.case-study-3__process-3: 作为跨团队集成问题和技术对齐的首选专家。
zh.case-study-3__outcome: 成功发布了一项重要的 AWS 功能。我的最佳实践成为组织标准，缩短了未来跨团队项目的上手时间。
zh.experience__intro_l1: 曾任 AWS 软件开发工程师。现于北京师范大学攻读世界经济学硕士。积极寻求科技与金融领域的产品经理职位。
zh.professional__1__bp1: 使用 Python/SQL 追回约 50 万美元计费差异。主导跨财务与工程团队的修复流程。
zh.professional__1__bp2: 开发并回测时间序列预测模型，优化云容量货币化策略，每年节省约 150 万美元资本支出。
zh.professional__1__bp3: 主导 AWS Lambda Managed Instances 跨团队执行。解决依赖项冲突并制定组织级最佳实践。
zh.professional__2__bp1: 构建并开源了包含超过 1000 万个图文对的视觉语言数据集。
zh.professional__2__bp2: 将数据集规模缩减 50%、训练时间缩短 60%、GPU 消耗减少 90%，性能损失小于 10%。
zh.professional__2__bp3: 使用深度学习与强化学习构建自动化 DeFi 资产管理策略。
zh.professional__2__bp4: 通过回测在历史市场数据中实现超过 5% 的投资回报率。
zh.professional__3__bp1: 通过调研设计与分析，识别拉丁裔移民申请社会保障项目的障碍。
zh.professional__3__bp2: 创建数据可视化并在社区战略会议上展示研究成果。
zh.publication__1__title: 量化交易的数据科学流水线：金融与加密经济学应用对比研究
zh.publication__1__author: L. Zhang, T. Wu, S. Lahrichi, C.G. Salas-Flores, J. Li
zh.publication__2__title: 提升图文连接的规范性与实用性
zh.publication__2__author: L. Zhang, C.G. Salas-Flores, D. Zou
zh.cert__ai__title: IBM AI 工程专业证书
zh.award__1__title: 《丝路木铎》全额优秀学生奖学金
zh.award__1__desc: 因学术表现卓越及在世界经济领域的科研潜力而授予的最高荣誉奖学金。
zh.award__2__desc: 开发了 AI 驱动的招聘工具 'Blinder Resume'，利用 GPT-3 技术消除招聘过程中的无意识偏见。
zh.award__3__title: 阿里巴巴 GET 全球挑战赛 【中国区总决赛选手】
zh.award__3__desc: 设计心理健康服务平台，从 250 多支团队中脱颖而出，晋级中国区总决赛。
zh.award__4__desc: 授予 GPA 排名在前 10% 的优秀学生。
zh.award__5__desc: 基于学术优异表现授予的四年全额学费减免奖学金。
zh.beyond__intro: 产品背后的人——多元经历如何塑造我的构建与领导方式。
zh.facts__street-dance__content: 竞技街舞舞者。纪律性、创造力、高压表现。
zh.facts__traveling__content: 在 3 个国家生活过。跨文化协作是本能。
zh.facts__mandarin__content: HSK 4 汉语水平。深度文化沉浸，不只是语言。
zh.contact__message: 积极寻求科技与金融领域的产品经理职位。
